ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trade_data" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade record */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Classification code for the trade data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trade data */,
  "period" TEXT /* Period of the trade data (e.g., 1995, Q1, etc.) */,
  "period_desc" TEXT /* Description of the period */,
  "aggregate_level" INTEGER /* Aggregate level of the data (e.g., 2 for country-level) */,
  "is_leaf_code" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the code is a leaf node */,
  "trade_flow_code" INTEGER /* Code for the trade flow (e.g., 1 for Import, 2 for Export) */,
  "trade_flow" TEXT /* Trade flow description (e.g., Import, Export) */,
  "reporter_code" INTEGER /* Code for the reporter country */,
  "reporter" TEXT /* Name of the reporter country */,
  "reporter_iso" TEXT /* ISO code for the reporter country */,
  "partner_code" INTEGER /* Code for the partner country */,
  "partner" TEXT /* Name of the partner country */,
  "partner_iso" TEXT /* ISO code for the partner country */,
  "commodity_code" INTEGER /* Code for the commodity */,
  "commodity" TEXT /* Description of the commodity */,
  "qty_unit_code" INTEGER /* Code for the quantity unit */,
  "qty_unit" TEXT /* Description of the quantity unit */,
  "qty" REAL /* Quantity of the trade */,
  "netweight_kg" REAL /* Net weight of the trade in kilograms */,
  "trade_value_usd" REAL /* Trade value in US dollars */,
  "flag" INTEGER /* Flag for special conditions or notes */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code used for the trade value */,
  "currency_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate used for conversion to USD */,
  "customs_value" REAL /* Customs value of the trade */,
  "transport_mode" TEXT /* Mode of transport (e.g., sea, air, land) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_trade_flow_code FOREIGN KEY ("trade_flow_code") REFERENCES trade_flows ("trade_flow_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_aggregate_level FOREIGN KEY ("aggregate_level") REFERENCES aggregate_levels ("aggregate_level"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_commodity_code FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_code") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_period FOREIGN KEY ("period") REFERENCES periods ("period"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_classification FOREIGN KEY ("classification") REFERENCES classifications ("classification_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_qty_unit_code FOREIGN KEY ("qty_unit_code") REFERENCES quantity_units ("qty_unit_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_flag FOREIGN KEY ("flag") REFERENCES flags ("flag"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_reporter_code FOREIGN KEY ("reporter_code") REFERENCES reporters ("reporter_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_partner_code FOREIGN KEY ("partner_code") REFERENCES partners ("partner_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "classification_code" TEXT /* Classification code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the classification code */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the classification is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trade data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each period */,
  "period" TEXT /* Period of the trade data (e.g., 1995, Q1, etc.) */,
  "period_desc" TEXT /* Description of the period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aggregate_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aggregate level */,
  "aggregate_level" INTEGER /* Aggregate level of the data (e.g., 2 for country-level) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the aggregate level */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the aggregate level is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_flows" (
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade flow */,
  "trade_flow_code" INTEGER /* Code for the trade flow (e.g., 1 for Import, 2 for Export) */,
  "trade_flow" TEXT /* Trade flow description (e.g., Import, Export) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporters" (
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporter country */,
  "reporter_code" INTEGER /* Code for the reporter country */,
  "reporter" TEXT /* Name of the reporter country */,
  "reporter_iso" TEXT /* ISO code for the reporter country */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Region code of the reporter country */,
  "subregion_code" TEXT /* Subregion code of the reporter country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reporter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "partners" (
  "partner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each partner country */,
  "partner_code" INTEGER /* Code for the partner country */,
  "partner" TEXT /* Name of the partner country */,
  "partner_iso" TEXT /* ISO code for the partner country */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Region code of the partner country */,
  "subregion_code" TEXT /* Subregion code of the partner country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("partner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commodities" (
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commodity */,
  "commodity_code" INTEGER /* Code for the commodity */,
  "commodity" TEXT /* Description of the commodity */,
  "hs_code" TEXT /* Harmonized System (HS) code of the commodity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the commodity is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quantity_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quantity unit */,
  "qty_unit_code" INTEGER /* Code for the quantity unit */,
  "qty_unit" TEXT /* Description of the quantity unit */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the quantity unit is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the trade record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the trade record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trade_data ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag */,
  "flag" INTEGER /* Boolean flag for special conditions */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the flag */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the flag is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the data source is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the data version was created */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the data version is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data validation rule */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the validation rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the validation rule */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the rule is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trade_data ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
